title: Portfolio and OTC Market launch with early-stage crypto investments
content_html:
Cryptool has officially launched the Portfolio and OTC Market modules, now extended to cover early-stage crypto investments.

Portfolio gives users:

  • One place to track every crypto holding
  • Status, vesting schedules and next unlock dates per position
  • Performance and historical trend tracking
  • Early-stage investments managed alongside the rest of the portfolio

OTC Market opens up:

  • Direct trading of both vested and unvested tokens
  • Large-volume trade execution with reduced settlement risk
  • Access to exclusive early-stage investment opportunities
  • Transparent pricing and fast on-platform settlement

This release completes the core Cryptool stack: fundraising, portfolio management and OTC, on one platform, with no need to stitch together separate tools.
author: Cryptool
